plugins.name: synchestra-cli
plugins.description: Synchestra CLI plugin: skills, commands, and hooks that teach AI agents how to use the synchestra CLI

plugins.name: specscore-cli

plugins.name: spec-studio
plugins.description: Spec Studio — AI skills for spec-driven development: specify, plan, build, verify, review, ship. Turns vague ideas into lint-clean SpecScore artifacts and gates implementation on approval.
